intent_precise: 441cc8.ot2.apiv2: Using reservoir (reservoir, slot 10). (1) Pause for incubation. (2) Pause for incubation. (3) Pause for incubation. (4) Pause for incubation.
intent: For this protocol, you'll be working with a reservoir positioned in slot 10. The procedure involves four sequential incubation steps, so you'll need to pause the system after each stage to allow for proper incubation timing. Make sure to monitor each pause carefully since the protocol relies on these timed intervals for optimal results.

commands.message:
suspend primer column in master mix
    distribute 14 ul to corresponding column of each pcr plate

    liquid handling method for master mix:
    slow flow rate for aspiration and dispense
    wait for liquid to finish moving after aspiration and dispense
    avoid introducing air into liquid (avoid complete dispenses)
    dispense to a surface
    withdraw tip slowly from liquid
